markdown:
# What I'm doing now

  I live in London, work at [Winnow](http://www.winnowsolutions.com/), and **try to focus on these things:**

  (in order of time spent)
- working full time as senior product manager for [Winnow](http://www.winnowsolutions.com/): cutting food waste in half by helping restaurants cook smarter
- a third of the food produced in the world goes to waste - [we use computer vision to identify and ultimately reduce food waste](https://winnowsolutions.wistia.com/medias/9jzzghxkrh)
- making a lovely home in SE London with my partner, looking forward to see my rhubarb grow to harvest (which will take two years...)
- building on my Python skills (where does time go?!) using data science and machine learning as the vehicle
- after recently winning a long battle against shoulder pain, were drawn into skirmishes with lower back pain (slipped disc), and as soon as I got on top of that my right foot gave up the ghost... is this what growing old feels like?
- aiming to get back to regular and pain free [CrossFit](http://www.theyardpeckham.com/) training
- also doing, when foot allows:
- fitness boxing at [1Rebel](http://www.1rebel.co.uk/)
- (failing to find time for) bare bow archery at [ArcheryFit](http://archeryfit.com/)
- (no longer, really...) bouldering at [the biscuit factory in Bermondsey](http://www.archclimbingwall.com/)
- reading [good books](https://www.goodreads.com/review/list/3011094?order=d&shelf=currently-reading&sort=date_added&visible_control=batchEdit)
- pondering the future

  also see [LinkedIn](https://uk.linkedin.com/in/hultberg), @[manne](https://twitter.com/manne), [Winnow](http://www.winnowsolutions.com/), (or my stale @[mannepanne](https://www.instagram.com/mannepanne/))

  For a more detailed view of what I have been up to recently, see my profile at Gyroscope

  (list last updated: March 2019 | credit for the /now idea: [Derek Sivers](https://sivers.org/nowff))
